description_long: This is a vintage convertible coupe car with a deep blue exterior and a beige soft top, featuring classic rounded fenders and chrome accents. The front grille is vertically slatted and flanked by large, round headlights, while the bumper is finished in chrome. The side profile reveals two doors, whitewall tires, and a spare wheel mounted on the side, with elegant chrome trim running along the lower body. The interior is upholstered in tan leather, with a wooden dashboard and steering wheel visible from the rear. The rear view shows a folded-down soft top, a trunk with chrome hinges, and dual tail lights. The overall design is reminiscent of luxury cars from the 1930s, exuding sophistication and historical charm.
description: A vintage blue convertible coupe with chrome accents, whitewall tires, and a tan leather interior, featuring a classic 1930s luxury design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the vertical chrome grille, round headlights, and the prominent front bumper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two-door configuration, side-mounted spare wheel, and whitewall tires.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the folded beige soft top, trunk, and dual tail lights.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible door, chrome trim, and side-mounted spare wheel.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
